title: Probe: causal chain + parallel principles + quotable line
note: Authored probe. The causal chain is explicit and directional (A causes B causes C), which is exactly what text-blocks-slide with arrows exists for. Four named parallel principles suit icon cards. There is one attributed, self-contained quote.
licence: Authored for this suite; MIT with the repository.

expectedSlideTypes.because: explicit causal chain: early billing -> abandonment -> empty workspace -> failed reactivation
four named parallel principles: Speed, Trust, Clarity, Recovery
one attributed quote from Marieke de Vries that stands alone

expectedCharacteristics: Uses arrowed text blocks for the causal chain rather than flattening it to bullets
Gives the four principles an icon-card treatment with sensible icons
Sets the customer quote as a quote slide, attributed
